remaining_params.SpellDescription: Exile X target creature cards from your graveyard. For each creature card exiled this way, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token.
remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Choose X target creature cards in your graveyard
remaining_params.StackDescription: {p:You} exiles {c:Targeted} from their graveyard. For each creature card exiled this way, {p:You} creates a 2/2 black Zombie creature token.
